name: Short-Term Momentum Scanner
description: Runs 3x daily (8AM, 12PM, 4PM ET, Mon-Fri): Scans for stocks with strong short-term momentum — price above 20-day MA, RSI between 50-70 (not overbought), volume >1.5x average, and positive 5-day price change. Stores candidates in watchlist for pattern detection.

parameters.content:
## Short-Term Momentum Scanner

Required: postgresApi, httpHeaderAuth (FMP)
Scans 3x daily for momentum setups
Filters: vol >1M, price >$5, RSI 50-70, above 20MA

parameters.query: SELECT DISTINCT ticker, value as rsi_value, signal as rsi_signal FROM technical_indicators WHERE indicator_name = 'RSI_14' AND indicator_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '2 days' AND value BETWEEN 30 AND 70

INSERT INTO watchlists (strategy, ticker, score, status, metadata) VALUES ('short_term', '{{$json.ticker}}', {{$json.rsi}}, 'active', '{"price": {{$json.price}}, "volume": {{$json.volume}}, "beta": {{$json.beta}}, "rsi": {{$json.rsi}}, "scan_time": "{{$now.format("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm")}}" }') ON CONFLICT (strategy, ticker) DO UPDATE SET score = EXCLUDED.score, metadata = EXCLUDED.metadata, status = 'active';
MERGE (w:Watchlist {name: 'short_term', strategy: 'Short-Term Trading'}) WITH w MATCH (c:Company {ticker: $ticker}) MERGE (c)-[r:IN_WATCHLIST]->(w) SET r.score = $score, r.updatedAt = datetime();
